Remarks/Remarques: Clone of Curve 56.00 with a slight tweak (+0.004m change to offset) to slightly improve error stats on all measurements above the breakpoint taken from 2015 to end of 2020 including highest measurement on record since the 70's.

Top end above breakpoint coincident (within 3%) of Curve 55.00. Slight improvement in definition around breakpoint.  Lower end drawn to 2018 measurements, with slight improvement over curve 55 error stats when all measurements selected.

Levels 2012-01-17 determined low point of notch of rectangular weir to be 0.019m and thus an offset of 0.019m was applied to the curve. A break-point was also surveyed in as 0.327m, where rectangular notch opens up to a broad shelf of the concrete control.
